entry.title: New IDC FA807518D0002 awarded to ALION SCIENCE AND TECHNOLOGY CORPORATION for the amount of $0

ns1:fundingRequestingAgencyID.name: IMMEDIATE OFFICE OF THE SECRETARY OF DEFENSE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: INFORMATION ANALYSIS CENTER MULTIPLE AWARD CONTRACT

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: R&D- OTHER RESEARCH AND DEVELOPMENT (APPLIED RESEARCH/EXPLORATORY DEVELOPMENT)

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: RESEARCH AND DEVELOPMENT IN THE PHYSICAL, ENGINEERING, AND LIFE SCIENCES (EXCEPT NANOTECHNOLOGY AND BIOTECHNOLOGY)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
